goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 13:00' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'cinema' and should be in the 'east'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 13:00 and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get train ID and arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of cinema and should be in the east
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get phone number
